name: book-to-persona
description: Converts any bestselling book PDF into a dual-purpose persona blueprint — coaches humans AND governs AI agents. 3-phase pipeline: Kimi K2.5 extracts, DeepSeek V3.2-Speciale analyzes, GPT-5.3 Codex synthesizes. QMD-indexed for retrieval.
author: BlackCEO / Trevor Otts
